title: botrychium × argutum
intro: Botrychium × argutum, also known as the intermediate fern or the intermediate grape fern, is a rare, hybrid species of flowering plant in the genus Botrychium, resulting from the cross between B. dissectum and B. virginianum. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Botrychium × argutum are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support the immune system. Botrychium × argutum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in folk medicine, although its use and effectiveness have not been extensively scientifically studied.
